extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web with a workflow project open in the Explorer panel and the Main.xaml file selected under the Orchestrator Tools solution. In the workflow designer, a sequence is visible containing a Manual Trigger, a Query Entity Records activity, and a For each Record container with an annotation explaining that approved invoice JSON objects should be added to the out_Invoices list. Inside the loop, a nested step labeled “For each JSON object in the approved invoices list” is present.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the Main.xaml workflow already configured with a Manual Trigger, a Query Entity Records step, and a For each Record loop for processing approved invoice JSON objects and adding them to the out_Invoices list.
